overall.description: A cinematic third-person gameplay sequence from The Witcher 3 showing a character walking through the sunlit medieval town of Toussaint during golden hour. The character descends a cobblestone path past stone villas with red tile roofs and ornate balconies, passing under a stone archway bridge while the camera smoothly follows from behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: hillside cobblestone path overlooking terraced town

agents.ego_description: character walking down a sloping cobblestone path overlooking the town with mountain backdrop

entered.detail: large stone building with decorative balcony and red awning on the hillside
tall mountain visible in the background against the blue sky
worn cobblestone path winding down the hillside
low stone wall with metal railing along the left side of the path
cluster of terracotta roof tiles on buildings cascading down the hill
yellow building with green shutters visible on the right side of the town

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a wide view of a sunlit medieval town built on terraced hillsides. The camera follows the character descending a cobblestone path, approaching a prominent stone villa with an ornate balcony. The mountain peak looms in the background under a clear sky with scattered clouds, while red tile roofs dot the landscape below.

scene_state.functional_zone: historic town street with terraced stone buildings

events.description: character passes the stone villa with ornate balcony on the left

agents.ego_description: character walking along the street passing the large stone villa and approaching the archway bridge

notable_agents.action: townsfolk walking toward the camera on the cobblestone street

entered.detail: stone bridge with arched tunnel passing over the street ahead
fortified stone walls and buildings of the upper town tier

segments.scene_description: The character continues along the cobblestone street, passing the ornate stone villa on the left. The camera approaches a stone archway bridge that spans over the path ahead. Other pedestrians walk toward the character, and the green-shuttered building on the right grows larger as the distance closes.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow street passing under stone archway bridge

events.description: character passes under the stone archway bridge into the lower town area

agents.ego_description: character walking under the stone archway and continuing through the lower town streets

entered.detail: large leafy tree growing near the archway entrance
tall gothic cathedral spires visible above the upper town walls
wooden construction scaffolding along the right side building

segments.scene_description: The character passes under the stone archway bridge, transitioning into a narrower section of the lower town. A tall tree dominates the center view while the upper town cathedral spires rise in the background. The camera continues following the character as they navigate the cobblestone streets past wooden scaffolding and terraced buildings.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement descending from a wide, terraced hillside vista into the intimate, narrow streets of a medieval town. It begins with a sweeping view of red tile roofs and a distant mountain peak as the camera follows the character down a cobblestone path toward an ornate stone villa. As the character continues forward, the perspective shifts to a street-level view, passing the villa and approaching a stone archway bridge while pedestrians cross the path. The scene then transitions under the bridge into a more enclosed section of the lower town, where the view is framed by a tall central tree and the rising spires of a cathedral in the background. Finally, the camera glides past wooden scaffolding and terraced buildings, deepening the immersion into the town's dense architectural layout.
